textByHash.507918ddf98f821e376084272da82c825919d04e: Hey, how you doing? You a stowaway?
textByHash.b1ae8671ac24c3c4abf4e9fface1c5aba163d768: Hey, I'm not here to judge you, if you're a stowaway you picked a good ship for it!
textByHash.8adb29e799f02ae398ec0f005009d5b9f709a222: There's lots of convenient hiding places around here - I should know, whenever I'm in trouble with the Captain I find myself a good barrel to hide in, until the fuss dies down.
textByHash.25f9f613ab793cb71800d6adaf1f771d05b89802: Mostly make coffee. Occasionally I have to swab the decks, but pirates aren't exactly known for cleanliness, you know?
textByHash.d50f5456cddf010786adb53afc6713dad5e5f097: No... Usually he's one of the best around, I don't know why we didn't reach our destination like we were supposed to, and it CERTAINLY wasn't anything to do with me
textByHash.f401b7d4b467e1b35b378e1bf5a420675ec7dde0: Good, because it has NOTHING to do with me!
textByHash.cc3e6cb463c21d47369134a4928914c24f6ed5d4: Yeah, the navigator, absolutely, sounds about right, yup.
textByHash.45ececfec2b7c2bcd68fe04faf6da2c9df9fd60d: Nope, it has certainly nothing to do with me or anything that I have done to the ship, I swear on my dead mothers life!
textByHash.8a338b7f7d932a9a22d2d9b2ebe54d6844c05f08: Just call me 'boy'. Everybody else does.
textByHash.9d20b6c2fcb4cc4927abb5d12e29c635d16b2938: Not that I can remember, no.
textByHash.f12d08c21187c5600e7463fe54f562faf88a7ea9: A jinx? I don't know ANYTHING about that!
textByHash.2d504ed33431361f33a60d987ff7857eae7a1a0a: You weren't? Oh. IT WAS STILL NOTHING TO DO WITH ME!
textByHash.cdce195ce9c7945b92c819aaac5aa62f82e2f81f: Sorry. It's my job, you know?
textByHash.e42df83fd53f14e882bf6bb8afe4b4d86b34d6fc: I'm always getting the blame for things that go wrong aboard.
textByHash.d9aa74c6a8b19fa1e2a94c254810a28fa84e7a6a: I SWEAR I DIDN'T MEAN TO!
textByHash.616d0876a3c61bf1a2ae27c61de2274a2b132b79: ...Nothing. I didn't do anything. At all.
textByHash.4fda3c45723f6983a479f2887726e54cfce15b7f: And nobody can prove that I did, even if I had, which I didn't so they can't. So there.
textByHash.8573f13b3a4dc6adf7e2bd0625bd4a9450ae68a6: No, I'm telling you the EXACT OPPOSITE!
textByHash.5758ea3ceb9388089049b3a9d074777dc0baa8b3: NO! NOT ME! NUH-UH! NO WAY!
textByHash.5ebf8ee32e5aa29cca437bc871b6e1f08704aa9f: Sorry, I just didn't want you getting the wrong impression and telling the Captain anything, is all.
textByHash.69a56f0e962e4abcb4916cb51238bb90d9b02c05: Hi. Did you find the jinx yet?
textByHash.91c987d6d6e0a213a213834926a2a238b3bc2602: Oh no... Look, I'm SO SORRY, I SWEAR it wasn't my fault!
textByHash.49fc9bf75c543f26d9aa4731956272a8435c00e4: Erm, sorry, nothing, what did you want to know?
textByHash.f67b94eaca1a64c8cafec6ec5eab7b7b295a0ab4: Oh, the feast, right, yeah, I was definitely there at that, absolutely.
textByHash.6bafcfa67d8aa5f75585775c9a8cea4148c76cd3: Um, no, no, everyone was there, yup.
textByHash.483486d5cfe2e2f50dfdcc03afa92b10587f2063: Nope, we had a meal and then, um, some other stuff happened...
textByHash.47972e418dc43dc496698b5d2575e77e861556ed: Um... And then... Er, we all went to bed for an early night.
textByHash.2b691d7afe8257a7d831cc52bee5d90c6b4d5a95: No, it TOTALLY happened EXACTLY like that. I swear.
textByHash.c28e511cfa1b7b772645375c74266972a431e2aa: Yup, sounds like it, okay, well 'bye!
textByHash.85ac0d69ed3e1bed619780382a8dfc40f483f78a: I'M SO SORRY! I SWEAR I DIDN'T MEAN TO!
textByHash.8d30f37648ce48f0a0a8f110abf7d217bc9a6f91: Um, no, no it really was, yup, so somebody saw the first mate leave and not, oh, say, saw me, right?
textByHash.d32a72ace2416e015caba1911dc520a304467220: [laugh][laugh][laugh][laugh] no, no, not at all, definitely not, nope.
textByHash.fa4ba65610071b50a6924b0a7c881197e9587c18: So it was all his fault? What a relief, uh, tragedy that has befallen us that is entirely all his fault and not mine.
textByHash.26794072a5ff90da81cbee574adfc5745be6f49f: There's no need to brag! Yes, I left the feast. I was lured by a girl from the Moon Clan, she promised me control of the ship if I did this simple task for her. I couldn't resist. Have you any idea how hard it is being
textByHash.52ef69b69fcf0b46423db8b61d31cdbc598814d2: a boy on a ship full of pirates?! I had no idea it would turn out how it has.
textByHash.d79232e0bf143e07d33ab23388dabf11cc5b71f4: She showed me some symbols, she then asked me to draw five of them throughout the ship. Some kind of magic jinx. Please don't tell the Captain! He'll kill me! If I ever get to that island again, I'm going to see what
textByHash.a46b515e01d91ab404bc87ebd231f1c8da1094a3: she has to say for herself.
textByHash.7bfc415e22784d2d56c2422a267c0880615a3861: You'll need a special kind of lantern to see them, there are five symbols in total I think. I vaguely remember what I put them on. One was up on a wall.
textByHash.f4a6715875980984806bbdf892b6bc2327e40acf: One was on a container. One was on a box of some sort. One was on a support. The last one is hazy, all I remember is that it was big and metal.
textByHash.9444369fee3953ff4625eb6968ee1215dd5e087d: I'm not! Honest. Look, I have a lantern and lens here, put them together then light it with a tinderbox. Then you can use it to search the ship for the symbols.
textByHash.a71bb84da7e6d8e0bd2007d370ac6b59d4b1ac3f: I vaguely remember what I put them on. One was up on a wall. One was on a container. One was on a box of some sort.
textByHash.48b8c4477c10e8ecd387cc2ff67f754450d00afb: One was on a support. The last one is hazy, all I remember is that it was big and metal. Use the lantern and lens together and light with a
textByHash.c5bf75c688054093a6bf0314ec0df9c66630c40f: tinderbox. Then you can use it to search the ship for the symbols.
textByHash.fe911a2b9b916eedf22bdbd1b0a09835a7be2bc2: One was on a support. The last one is hazy, all I remember is that it was big and metal.
textByHash.c9b867997ccf59609a9fc75336d7abe2769d845d: I'm not! Honest. Look, use the lantern and lens together and light it with a tinderbox. Then you can use it to search the ship for the symbols.
textByHash.27436478b46e86cd68c34de9cdfe9678a789d6dd: By all means, here you go!
textByHash.0b39e23f086b1dc39dbabdd5a5c745bf146a9c3e: I will, I will. I'm just psyching myself up first!
textByHash.f473d5af561126a31ed1ef8bdd144feb3626f9d7: That I did, that I did!
textByHash.66a92ed7ad50b571e038045aba110c9bcd558d87: She turned out to be really nice! She's joining us to become a pirate!
textByHash.487c8a4d51f2331b778f425925ee60ef6694c48f: I bet you're after another lens!
textByHash.2e40bfa33e757409e1f8656c28c01328b74d77a0: Hey, I think I'm learning a thing or two from these Moon Clan ladies.
textByHash.eb7f3b18dba155946ff67d9768e3d9cc10926960: Huh, oh ok, I suppose I owe you one.
